YUM-THE_SQUAD_POWER.title: Squad force
YUM-THE_SQUAD_POWER.description: Hitting an enemy with attacks [gold]Forges[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] to all players.
YUM-THE_SQUAD_POWER.smartDescription: Hitting an enemy with attacks[gold]Forges[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] to all players.
YUM-DEMON_BLOOD_POWER.title: Demonic delight
YUM-NECROFICATION_POWER.title: Necroficated
YUM-NECROFICATION_POWER.description: Temporarily immune to any source of HP loss. Then dies.
YUM-NECROFICATION_POWER.smartDescription: Immune to HP loss for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, then dies.
YUM-PUNISHING_HAND_POWER.title: Punishing hand
YUM-PUNISHING_HAND_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is on top of your draw pile, play it automatically.
YUM-PUNISHING_HAND_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, if [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is on top of your draw pile, play it automatically.
